ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Code of the airport (e.g., BWI) */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport in meters */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code of the airport */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "airline_code" TEXT /* Code of the airline (e.g., AA for American Airlines) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airline is headquartered */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the airline */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the airline was founded */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* Number of aircraft in the airline's fleet */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the airline */,
  "headquarters_city" TEXT /* City where the airline's headquarters is located */,
  "headquarters_state" TEXT /* State where the airline's headquarters is located */,
  "headquarters_country" TEXT /* Country where the airline's headquarters is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_performance" (
  "flight_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight performance record */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the airport from which the flight originates */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the airline operating the flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Unique flight number */,
  "destination_airport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the destination airport */,
  "departure_hour" TEXT /* The hour during which the flight departs (e.g., 0:00-0:6:00) */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the flight departs (e.g., Sunday) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the flight took place */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month the flight took place */,
  "on_time" INTEGER /* Number of flights that departed on time */,
  "number_of_flights" INTEGER /* Total number of flights */,
  "flights_delayed" INTEGER /* Number of flights that were delayed */,
  "flights_cancelled" INTEGER /* Number of flights that were cancelled */,
  "avg_delay_min" REAL /* Average delay in minutes for delayed flights */,
  "scheduled_departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time of the flight */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time of the flight */,
  "scheduled_arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time of the flight */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time of the flight */,
  "reason_for_delay" TEXT /* Reason for the delay (if applicable) */,
  "reason_for_cancellation" TEXT /* Reason for the cancellation (if applicable) */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers on the flight */,
  "cargo_weight_kg" INTEGER /* Weight of the cargo in kilograms */,
  "fuel_consumption_l" INTEGER /* Fuel consumption in liters */,
  "aircraft_model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft used for the flight */,
  "pilot_name" TEXT /* Name of the pilot */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., on time, delayed, cancelled, diverted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_performance_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_performance_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_performance_destination_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "flight_performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight performance record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the flight performance data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the flight performance data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_flight_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_performance_id") REFERENCES flight_performance ("flight_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
